ddls:
CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "citation_number" TEXT /* Citation number assigned to the violation */,
  "issued_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the citation was issued */,
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of violation */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the violation occurred */,
  "plate_state" TEXT /* Vehicle plate state */,
  "vehicle_plate" TEXT /* Vehicle plate number */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Fine amount associated with the violation */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the citation was added to the system */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the citation location */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who issued the citation */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved in the citation */,
  "violation_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the violation */,
  "violation_status" TEXT /* Status of the violation */,
  "violation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the violation */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the fine */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Notification status to the violator */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date of the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_violation_code FOREIGN KEY ("violation_code") REFERENCES violations ("violation_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_vehicle_plate FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_plate") REFERENCES vehicles ("plate_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Code representing each type of traffic violation */,
  "violation_name" TEXT /* Name of the violation */,
  "violation_category" TEXT /* Category to which the violation belongs */,
  "violation_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the violation */,
  "violation_penalty" REAL /* Standard fine amount for the violation */,
  "violation_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the violation */,
  "violation_laws" TEXT /* Laws or regulations that the violation breaches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geometric coordinates of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood or district of the location */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Additional address information */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "plate_number" TEXT /* Vehicle plate number */,
  "plate_state" TEXT /* State of the vehicle registration plate */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle owner */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the vehicle owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fines" (
  "fine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fine record */,
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citation the fine is associated with */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fine */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fine */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the fine should be paid */,
  "late_fees" REAL /* Late fees applied to the fine */,
  "waiver_reason" TEXT /* Reason if the fine is waived */,
  "dispute_reason" TEXT /* Reason if the fine is disputed */,
  "payment_history" TEXT /* History of payments made towards the fine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fines_citation_id FOREIGN KEY ("citation_id") REFERENCES citations ("citation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the officer was hired */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citation being paid off */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid towards the citation */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "receipt_number" TEXT /* Receipt number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_citation_id FOREIGN KEY ("citation_id") REFERENCES citations ("citation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
